summary: Code Refactoring + Global FY testing complete. Backend split from monolithic server.py (5249 lines) to ~70 line server.py + 10 route modules - all 26 API tests pass. Frontend components Dashboard.jsx and Payments.jsx extracted - FIXED missing imports (FileText, Select, KMS_YEARS, SEASONS in Dashboard.jsx; safePrintHTML, Printer, X in Payments.jsx). Global FY selector visible in header, saves to DB via /api/fy-settings. Opening Balance card visible in Cash Book with carry-forward from previous FY.

bugs_fixed.issue: FileText is not defined error - missing import
Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue not imported
KMS_YEARS and SEASONS constants not defined
bugs_fixed.fix: Added generateKMSYears function and SEASONS constant

bugs_fixed.issue: Printer, X, Edit icons not imported
bugs_fixed.fix: Added Printer, X, Edit to lucide-react imports

backend_apis_after_refactoring.GET_reports_outstanding: PASS - Returns DC, MSP, trucks, agents data
backend_apis_after_refactoring.GET_reports_party_ledger: PASS - Returns ledger entries and party list
backend_apis_after_refactoring.GET_branding: PASS - Returns company name and tagline

global_fy_settings.PUT_fy_settings: PASS - Saves and persists FY setting

opening_balance_in_cash_book.ui_opening_balance_card: PASS - Visible in Cash Book tab (data-testid='opening-balance-card')

context_for_next_testing_agent: Code refactoring testing complete. Backend split into 10 route modules under /app/backend/routes/. Frontend Dashboard.jsx and Payments.jsx extracted from App.js. Global FY selector in header persists to /api/fy-settings. Opening Balance in Cash Book shows previous FY closing or manually saved values. Fixed missing imports in extracted components. All 26 backend tests pass, all tabs work in frontend. Previous: iteration_18 tested Private Trading.
